# Queens Playtest

Use this skill to run a repeatable pre-release gameplay check.

## Procedure
1. Load the site locally or from the Pages preview.
2. Execute the checklist in order.
3. Record any failures and classify severity.
4. Provide a concise go/no-go recommendation.

## Checklist
- [Playtest Checklist](./references/playtest-checklist.md)
